title: Text Art: Copy & Paste ASCII & Unicode Art Collections
meta_description: Copy and paste text art вҖ” ASCII cats, braille hearts, star frames, and kaomoji classics, plus blocks to draw your own. Click any piece to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Finished ASCII and Unicode art pieces plus every box-drawing, block, and braille character you need to make your own. Click to copy instantly.
intro: Text art (also called ASCII art) is artwork drawn entirely with characters вҖ” box-drawing lines, shaded blocks, braille dots, and plain keyboard symbols. It works anywhere text does: Discord chats, game lobbies, X posts, YouTube comments, and plain-text bios. This page collects small, ready-to-paste text art pieces you can copy in one click, plus the individual building-block characters if you want to draw something original.

sections.label: Lines
sections.intro: Straight lines, corners, and junctions вҖ” the skeleton of frames, tables, and structured text art.

sections.label: Blocks
sections.intro: Solid and shaded blocks for filling shapes and creating gradients in larger pieces.

sections.label: Braille
sections.intro: Braille patterns give text art its finest resolution вҖ” most modern dot art is drawn with these.

sections.label: Shapes
sections.intro: Simple geometric characters for stars, diamonds, and decorative detail work.

collection_section.label: Art Pieces
collection_section.intro: Copy a complete multi-line text art piece in one click вҖ” keep the vertical format so the lines stay aligned.
